description: The Information Security team has mandated a transition to SAML 2.0 Single Sign-On (SSO). An Identity Provider (IdP) configuration file and certificate have been placed on your desktop (~/Desktop/saml_idp_config.txt and ~/Desktop/azure_idp_cert.pem). Log in to ManageEngine OpManager at http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123), navigate to the Authentication settings, and configure SAML Authentication manually using the exact parameters provided in the text file. Save the configuration but DO NOT click 'Test Connection' or 'Enable SAML SSO' as the dummy IdP URLs will not respond.
